entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explain the basic concepts of Biology (meaning, branches, basic terminologies, importance and its relationship with other disciplines)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss meaning of biology, basic biological terminologies and branches of biology
Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on importance of biology in our life
Jigsaw: Guide students in manageable groups, to explain the relationship of Biology with other disciplines through jigsaw
entries.assessment: The basic concept of Biology are clearly explained
resources: Charts, relevant text, and online resources on basic concept of biology
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe a cell (meaning,types, structures and functions)
teaching_learning_activities: Group Discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss concept of cell
ICT-Based learning: Guide students to explain cell structures and cell differentiation through simulation
Experimentation: Guide students to prepare microscope slides of a plant and animal cell
entries.assessment: The concept of cell is described clearly
resources: Cells charts/ models, light microscope, slide covers, microscope slides, and cells online resources
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (c) Describe nutrition in plants (photosynthesis, leaf structure and mineral requirements)
teaching_learning_activities: Field visit: Guide students to collect different plant leaves around the school compound to observe and explain the external structure of leaves
Group Discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the concept of nutrition in plants, internal structure of a leaf and how photosynthesis occurs in the leaf
Guest speaker: Invite guest speaker (Agricultural extension officer) to share with students on mineral requirements in plants
entries.assessment: Nutrition in plants is described clearly
resources: Relevant equipment and apparati, heat sources, water, relevant chemicals and reagents, leaves, pond weeds, nutrition in plants models/ charts, and nutrition in plants online resources
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of scientific biological terminologies
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explain the concept and systems of classification (meaning ,importance of classification, rules of scientific naming of organisms, artificial and natural classification systems)
teaching_learning_activities: Field visit: Guide students to collect various living things around the school compound and group all the items according to their similarities
Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of classification
Group Discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss systems of classification and scientific rules of naming organisms
Project: Guide students to assign scientific names to organisms and label trees around their school environment
entries.assessment: Concept and systems of classification explained clearly
resources: Variety of living organisms, classification charts, and classification online resources
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

Project: Guide students to assign scientific names to organisms and label trees around their school environment

entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of scientific biological terminologies
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe the major groups of organisms: (Monera, Protista, Fungi, Plantae, Animalia and Viruses)
teaching_learning_activities: Field vist: Guide students in groups to collect various living organisms around the school compound which are representatives of the major groups of organisms and classify them
Group Discussion: Guide students in manageable groups, to identify the major groups of organisms and viruses, discuss their features and economic importance
entries.assessment: The major groups of organisms and viruses are described clearly
resources: Variety of living organisms, preserved specimens, charts on major groups of organisms, and classification online resources
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic skills for conducting biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the basic skills for conducting biological experiments (observation, measurement and experimentation)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students to visit biology laboratory to identify common apparatus and equipment used in biological experiments
Experimentation: Guide students to perform activities that involve observation, measurement and experimentation
entries.assessment: Basic skills for conducting biological experiments are correctly described
resources: Basic skills for conducting biological expeiments online resources, colourful pictures, perfume, hot water, preserved specimen, live plants and animals specimens, thermometer, weighing scales, rulers, boxes, stones, variety of equipment and apparati used in conducting biological experiments
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic skills for conducting biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (b) Carry out microscopic observation of a cell
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to explore procedures that are required to observe a cell under a microscope
Laboratory practical: Guide students to observe cells of living things under light microscope
entries.assessment: Microscopic observation of a cells carried out correctly
resources: Light microscope, slide covers, microscope slide, online resources on microscopic observation of a cell and relevant apparati
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic skills for conducting biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (c) Carry out investigations related to photosynthesis (conditions necessary for photosynthesis)
teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to carry out investigations on the conditions necessary for photosynthesis
entries.assessment: Investigations related to photosynthesis are carried out correctly
resources: Variety of equipment and apparati, live plant specimens, relevant chemicals, reagents and photosynthesis online resources
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 3.2 Prepare and present results of biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (a) Prepare and present a report on cell and photosynthesis investigations
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in groups to discuss the steps in preparation of biological investigation report
Project: Guide students to prepare a report using the steps in preparation of a biological investigation report
Presentation: Guide students to present a biological investigation report
entries.assessment: Investigation report on cell and photosynthesis is prepared and presented correctly
resources: Relevant text on steps for scientific investigations and report writing, online resources on report writing
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
